title: ECSF SEAL scale, domain definitions, weights, and scoring formula
description: The EU Cloud Sovereignty Framework (ECSF) is not a criteria catalogue like C3A: it defines a maturity scale (SEAL 0-4), eight SOV domain definitions, official procurement weights, and a scoring formula. This schema captures those four data shapes as a single document, distinct from control-record.schema.json which captures ECSF's per-domain contributing factors as individual records (data/extracted/ecsf.json).

document.description: Human-readable source document identifier, e.g. 'EU Cloud Sovereignty Framework v1.2.1 (Oct. 2025)'.

seal_levels.description: Sovereignty Effectiveness Assurance Levels, SEAL-0 (no sovereignty) through SEAL-4 (full digital sovereignty).

domains.description: All 8 ECSF Sovereignty Objectives (SOV-1..SOV-8), including SOV-7 (inheritance-only per CLAUDE.md) and SOV-8 (out of scope), kept here for traceability even though SOV-7/SOV-8 do not produce control records.

generalized_description.description: Phase 2d-ii: description with {NATION}/{TRUSTED_REGION} placeholders substituted per data/rules/generalization-rules.yaml. description itself stays verbatim (this file carries full verbatim text publicly per D-012 — no isolation regime applies here).

weight_percent.description: Official ECSF procurement weight for this domain (section 5). Distinct from the outcome-derived domain weighting CSAT computes per assessment (Phase 5) — this is the source framework's own value, kept for traceability.

scope.description: assessed: contributing factors extracted as control records in ecsf.json. inheritance_only: SOV-7, satisfied by C5/ISO/SOC2 evidence per CLAUDE.md, no questions. out_of_scope: SOV-8, not part of this tool per CLAUDE.md.

factors.description: Verbatim contributing-factor bullet list for this domain, as printed in ECSF section 4. Present for SOV-1..7; omitted for SOV-8 (out of scope, not extracted).

description.description: Plain-language restatement of the formula, since the PDF's mathematical notation does not extract cleanly as text.

source_text.description: The formula as extracted from the PDF, kept verbatim including any character-extraction artifacts from the mathematical notation.
